privileged_info_summary: The refactor_to_viewstub task is a synthetic Android development exercise. The task involves refactoring DashboardApp (located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/DashboardApp) by extracting a heavy 'details_panel' LinearLayout from activity_stats.xml into a new layout file (layout_stats_details.xml) and replacing it with a ViewStub (ID: stub_details). The details panel contains exactly four labeled metrics: 'Daily Active Users', 'Retention Rate', 'Session Length', and 'Conversion Funnel', along with progress bars and visual elements. The main activity code (StatsActivity.kt in package com.example.dashboardapp) must be updated to inflate the ViewStub on demand. The verifier checks for: (1) creation of the extracted layout with content, (2) ViewStub tag in main layout referencing the new layout and removal of heavy content, (3) activity logic to inflate the ViewStub, and (4) successful compilation. All metadata values in task.json are accurate.
